description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and a monthly schedule. The workflow should have three jobs: build-linux, build-flatpak, and build-windows. Each job should check out the repository with submodules, install dependencies, and build the project. The build-linux and build-windows jobs should use a matrix strategy to build in Release and Debug configurations. The build-linux job should install Rust and use CMake to generate and build the project. The build-flatpak job should use a Flatpak container to build the project. The build-windows job should install Boost and use CMake to generate and build the project. Upload the build artifacts for each job.
